mapper.select: select c.column_name, (case when c.is_nullable = 'NO' and coalesce(pk.is_pk, false) = false then '1' else '0' end) as is_required, (case when coalesce(pk.is_pk, false) then '1' else '0' end) as is_pk, c.ordinal_position as sort, coalesce(col_description(cls.oid, a.attnum), '') as column_comment, (case when c.is_identity = 'YES' or c.column_default like 'nextval(%' then '1' else '0' end) as is_increment, format_type(a.atttypid, a.atttypmod) as column_type from information_schema.columns c join pg_namespace ns on ns.nspname = c.table_schema join pg_class cls on cls.relnamespace = ns.oid and cls.relname = c.table_name join pg_attribute a on a.attrelid = cls.oid and a.attname = c.column_name and a.attnum > 0 left join ( select i.indrelid, unnest(i.indkey) as attnum, true as is_pk from pg_index i where i.indisprimary ) pk on pk.indrelid = cls.oid and pk.attnum = a.attnum where c.table_schema = 'public' and c.table_name = #{tableName} order by c.ordinal_position
